notes: Settings is a utility-heavy screen. Most shells are generated, but nearly all visible labels and values remain live runtime text.
The center-family board should generate plates, tabs, rows, dividers, dropdown shells, and toggle shells while leaving labels and current values live.

regions.region_hint: tab strip text and close-row title treatment
regions.notes: Tab shells and the surrounding top band are generated, but the tab labels remain live FText and should not be baked into reference art or family boards.

regions.region_hint: all row labels, values, and helper text inside the settings shell
regions.notes: The content shell and row frames are generated. Row labels, current values, and option text stay live runtime text.

regions.region_hint: dropdown value wells and option labels
regions.notes: Generate the dropdown shell, trigger frame, and chevron treatment only. The selected value and dropdown options stay live.
Generate the toggle shells and compact state buttons, but keep the labels and selected-state text live.
